title: Use default as the default enterprise table size
requirement: Default enterprise table size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to shared table wrappers and direct table usage

title: Manual table composition must visually match default spec
requirement: If the table is composed manually row height cell padding and toolbar alignment should visually match the default specification
preferred_pattern: Normalize row height cell padding and toolbar alignment against the shared default baseline
anti_pattern: Do not leave manual tables with arbitrary spacing just because they are not using the stock component
notes: Use when auditing bespoke tables

title: Keep adjacent toolbar button spacing at 12px for normal buttons and 8px for icon buttons
requirement: When buttons are placed in a table toolbar horizontal spacing between adjacent normal buttons must be 12px and between icon buttons must be 8px
preferred_pattern: Use a shared toolbar wrapper or flex with gap-3 for normal buttons and gap-2 for icon-only buttons
anti_pattern: Do not add repeated one-off left or right margins between neighboring actions
notes: Tokenized gap is preferred over local margins. Normal buttons use 12px (gap-3)

title: Ensure final visual spacing is 12px for normal buttons and 8px for icon buttons
requirement: All button groups should have 12px final visual spacing between normal buttons and 8px final visual spacing between icon-only buttons
preferred_pattern: Use flex containers with gap-3 for normal buttons and gap-2 for icon-only buttons; ensure button components have margin:0
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary spacing values for button groups and do not rely on button component margins
notes: Applies to all button groups. Final visual spacing must be 12px for normal buttons (gap-3) and 8px for icon-only buttons (gap-2). Ensure button components have margin:0 to avoid adding extra spacing

title: Verify enterprise default size before editing
requirement: When touching a component verify whether it is using the enterprise default size
preferred_pattern: Check current props wrappers and inherited defaults before patching
anti_pattern: Do not patch spacing in isolation without checking the component's default size
notes: Use as an audit question

title: Verify action group alignment and spacing consistency
requirement: When touching a component verify whether action groups are aligned and spaced consistently
preferred_pattern: Normalize via shared wrappers or stable layout primitives
anti_pattern: Do not fix a single button if the group pattern remains inconsistent
notes: Use as an audit question

title: Prefer shared primitives over local padding and text overrides
requirement: When touching a component verify whether paddings heights and text styles are inherited from a shared primitive instead of being redefined locally
preferred_pattern: Move repeated rules into the shared primitive when safe
anti_pattern: Do not keep re-declaring the same local overrides across instances
notes: Use as an audit question

title: Consider enforcing repeated rules in a shared wrapper
requirement: When the same component rule appears repeatedly prefer enforcing it in a shared wrapper component
preferred_pattern: Patch the shared primitive if risk is acceptable
anti_pattern: Do not duplicate the same fix in many call sites when one wrapper can own it
notes: Use to generalize future rule additions

title: Use default as the default search input size
requirement: Default search input size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to all search input components

title: Use default as the default select size
requirement: Default select size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to all select components

title: Configure clearable and searchable for select components
requirement: Select components should be configured with clearable and searchable features when appropriate
preferred_pattern: Enable clearable prop and searchable prop in select component configuration
anti_pattern: Do not omit clearable and searchable features when users need to quickly clear or search options
notes: Applies to select components where these features are relevant

title: Use collapsed tags for multi-select in filter areas
requirement: When using multi-select in filter areas prioritize collapsed tags display
preferred_pattern: Set collapsed-tags prop to true for multi-select components in filter areas
anti_pattern: Do not show all selected tags inline when there are many selections in filter areas
notes: Applies to filter area multi-select components

title: Use collapsed tags with hover expand for multi-select in forms
requirement: When using multi-select in form pages prioritize collapsed tags with hover expand
preferred_pattern: Set collapsed-tags prop to true and enable hover expand for multi-select components in forms
anti_pattern: Do not show all selected tags inline when there are many selections in forms
notes: Applies to form page multi-select components

title: Use default as the default date picker size
requirement: Default date picker size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to all date picker components

title: Configure clearable for date picker components
requirement: Date picker components should be configured with clearable feature when appropriate
preferred_pattern: Enable clearable prop in date picker component configuration
anti_pattern: Do not omit clearable feature when users need to quickly clear the date selection
notes: Applies to date picker components where this feature is relevant

title: Fix multi-select column width to 40px
requirement: Table multi-select column width should be fixed at 40px
preferred_pattern: Set the width prop explicitly to 40px for multi-select columns
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary or inherited widths for multi-select columns
notes: Applies to table multi-select columns

title: Set minimum width of 44px for table index columns
requirement: Table index column width should be at least 44px
preferred_pattern: Set the width prop to at least 44px for index columns
anti_pattern: Do not use widths smaller than 44px for index columns
notes: Applies to table index columns

title: Freeze action column to the right
requirement: Table action column should be frozen to the right side
preferred_pattern: Set fixed prop to right for action columns
anti_pattern: Do not let action columns scroll with the table content
notes: Applies to table action columns

title: Use dash for empty table cells
requirement: When table cell data is empty use dash as placeholder
preferred_pattern: Display dash character when cell value is null or empty
anti_pattern: Do not leave empty cells blank or use inconsistent placeholders
notes: Applies to table cell data display

title: Add borders around multi-level table headers
requirement: When table has multi-level headers add borders around all header cells
preferred_pattern: Set border props for header cells in multi-level tables
anti_pattern: Do not leave header cells without borders in multi-level tables
notes: Applies to tables with multi-level headers

title: Add borders around cells in multi-level tables
requirement: When table has multi-level headers add borders around all data cells
preferred_pattern: Set border props for data cells in multi-level tables
anti_pattern: Do not leave data cells without borders in multi-level tables
notes: Applies to tables with multi-level headers

title: Use default as the default form size
requirement: Default form size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to all form components

title: Place Chinese labels above form fields
requirement: Chinese form labels should be placed above the form fields
preferred_pattern: Use label-position prop set to top for Chinese form layouts
anti_pattern: Do not place Chinese labels on the left side of form fields
notes: Applies to Chinese form layouts

title: Use default as the default text link size
requirement: Default text link size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to all text link components

title: Use default as the default dropdown button size
requirement: Default dropdown button size is default (Element Plus medium equivalent)
preferred_pattern: Set the component size prop explicitly to default when the component API supports it
anti_pattern: Do not rely on inherited arbitrary spacing or inconsistent implicit defaults
notes: Applies to all dropdown button components

title: Maintain consistent component width with max 4 per row
requirement: Form content area should have consistent component width with maximum 4 components per row
preferred_pattern: Use grid layout with equal column widths and limit to 4 columns
anti_pattern: Do not use inconsistent widths or place more than 4 components in a single row
notes: Applies to form content area layout

title: Align search form action buttons to the right
requirement: Action buttons in search forms should be aligned to the right side of the page
preferred_pattern: Use flex layout with justify-end or similar alignment for action button group
anti_pattern: Do not align action buttons to the left or center in search forms
notes: Applies to search form action buttons

title: Place important buttons on the right in global button groups
requirement: In global button groups important buttons should be placed on the right side with secondary buttons on the left
preferred_pattern: Arrange buttons with primary action on the right and secondary actions on the left
anti_pattern: Do not place important buttons on the left or mix button ordering inconsistently
notes: Applies to global button groups

title: Place important buttons on the left in table toolbars
requirement: In table toolbars important buttons should be placed on the left side with secondary buttons on the right aligned to the left overall
preferred_pattern: Arrange buttons with primary action on the left and secondary actions on the right with left alignment
anti_pattern: Do not place important buttons on the right or mix button ordering inconsistently
notes: Applies to table toolbar buttons

title: Remove borders from single-level table headers
requirement: Single-level table headers should not have borders
preferred_pattern: Remove border props from header cells in single-level tables
anti_pattern: Do not add borders to single-level table headers
notes: Applies to tables with single-level headers

title: Use font icons for table action column buttons
requirement: Table action column buttons must use font icons with tooltips instead of text labels
preferred_pattern: Use font icon components with tooltips. Check project for custom component prefix. Use type="text" and color: inherit (see CMP-035)
anti_pattern: Do not use text labels or explicit type props (primary/danger) on icon-only buttons. Do not omit tooltips
default_value: Applies to all table action column buttons. Must work together with CMP-035 (icon-only button styling). CRITICAL: Icon-only buttons MUST have tooltips for accessibility. Use semantic icons that clearly represent their action. Compatible with any font icon library and UI framework (Element Plus
notes: Combine with CMP-035. Compatible with any icon library and UI framework.
column14: etc.) and ANY custom component library prefix.

title: Set tight gap between table action column icon buttons
applies_to: Table action column icon button spacing
requirement: Icon buttons in table action columns must be wrapped in a flex container with gap-2 and all button margins must be reset to 0 via scoped style
preferred_pattern: Wrap action column buttons in flex gap-2 and add :deep(.el-button) { margin: 0; } in scoped style. Button container itself should have no extra padding or margin
anti_pattern: Do not rely on default el-button margins or use arbitrary gap values. Do not leave icon buttons with default Element Plus margin spacing
notes: Applies to all table action columns with multiple icon buttons. The margin:0 reset is critical because Element Plus adds default margin to buttons.

title: Disable zebra striping for tables
requirement: Tables should not use zebra striping or alternating row colors
preferred_pattern: Disable zebra striping props or styles in table components
anti_pattern: Do not enable zebra striping or alternating row colors in tables
notes: Applies to all table components

title: Limit primary button to one per button group
requirement: A button group should contain at most one primary or important button to highlight a single key action
preferred_pattern: Use only one primary button in the same button group and use default or secondary styles for other buttons
anti_pattern: Do not use multiple primary buttons in the same button group as it confuses the user about the main action
notes: Applies to toolbars search forms and general action groups

title: Align date picker icon to the right side
requirement: Date picker icon should be aligned to the right side of the input field
preferred_pattern: Use component prop or style to align the icon to the right side
anti_pattern: Do not align date picker icon to the left side or use inconsistent icon alignment
notes: Applies to all date picker components

title: Use type=text and color: inherit for icon-only buttons
requirement: Icon-only buttons should use type=text and color: inherit to remove borders and ensure no color
preferred_pattern: Use type="text" prop for icon-only buttons and add scoped style color: inherit
anti_pattern: Do not use type=primary
default_value: or other explicit type props on icon-only buttons and do not rely on default component colors
notes: Icon-only buttons must use type="text" and CSS color: inherit to remove borders and default color
column12: Icon buttons should use type=text and CSS color: inherit to remove borders and ensure no color from component defaults

title: Use rgba(31
requirement: 0.05) for table header background
preferred_pattern: Table headers
anti_pattern: table,header,background,color,opacity
default_value: Table header background must use rgba(31, 85, 181, 0.05), applied via :deep() override
notes: Use scoped style to set el-table__header-wrapper background to rgba(31, 85, 181, 0.05)
column12: Do not use arbitrary header background colors or inconsistent opacity values

title: Set default table row height to 40px
requirement: Table row height should be 40px by default
preferred_pattern: Set row-height prop or style to 40px for table rows
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary or inconsistent row heights
notes: Applies to all table rows

title: Remove borders from filled buttons and tags
requirement: Buttons and tags with filled background colors should not have borders
preferred_pattern: Remove border props or styles from buttons and tags when they have background colors
anti_pattern: Do not add borders to filled buttons or tags as it creates visual redundancy
notes: Applies to all buttons and tags with background colors

title: Set input height to 32px and label height to 22px for vertical form layout
requirement: For vertical form layout: input height h-8 (32px), label height h-[22px] (22px), label-input gap space-1 (4px)
preferred_pattern: Use h-8 for inputs, h-[22px] for labels, space-1 for label-input gap
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary heights for inputs labels or inconsistent spacing in vertical form layouts
notes: Applies to all forms including search forms with vertical label layout

title: Form items must fill column width with grid 4-column layout
requirement: Each form item (input select datepicker etc.) must fill the full width of its grid column using w-full class. The form container should use a 4-column grid layout with gap-4
preferred_pattern: Use grid grid-cols-4 gap-4 on the form container and w-full on every el-form-item child so all item types uniformly fill their column
anti_pattern: Do not use fixed widths or let items shrink inconsistently. Do not leave empty space within grid columns
notes: Applies to all form containers with multiple items per row. Every el-form-item regardless of its input type must have w-full.

title: Place query button at far right with 12px spacing in search area
requirement: In search area the query button should be placed at the far right side with 12px spacing between buttons
preferred_pattern: Use flex layout with justify-end and 12px gap between buttons in search area
anti_pattern: Do not place query button in the middle or left side or use inconsistent button spacing
notes: Applies to search form action buttons

title: Set minimum width of 88px for medium buttons
requirement: Medium buttons should have a minimum width of 88px
preferred_pattern: Set min-width to 88px for medium sized buttons
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary widths smaller than 88px for medium buttons
notes: Applies to all medium sized buttons

title: Align table toolbar to the left side above the table
requirement: Table toolbar action area should be aligned to the left side and positioned above the table
preferred_pattern: Place toolbar on the left side above the table with left alignment
anti_pattern: Do not place toolbar on the right side or below the table or use inconsistent alignment
notes: Applies to all table toolbars and action areas

title: Set 8px spacing between table toolbar and table
requirement: Table toolbar should have 8px spacing from the top of the table
preferred_pattern: Use margin-top of 8px between toolbar and table
anti_pattern: Do not use arbitrary spacing or inconsistent spacing between toolbar and table
notes: Applies to all table toolbars and action areas

title: Place form labels above input fields
requirement: Form labels should be placed above the input fields
preferred_pattern: Use label-position prop set to top for form layouts
anti_pattern: Do not place form labels on the left side of input fields
notes: Applies to all form layouts

title: Prevent table header labels from wrapping
requirement: Table header labels should not wrap to multiple lines
preferred_pattern: Set show-overflow-tooltip prop or use nowrap style for table headers
anti_pattern: Do not allow table header labels to wrap to multiple lines
notes: nowrap

title: Set expand-icon-position to left for Collapse panel
requirement: Collapse panel component expand-icon-position prop must be set to left so the expand/collapse arrow icon appears on the left side of the panel title
preferred_pattern: Set expand-icon-position prop to left for all Collapse components
anti_pattern: Do not use right or default icon position for Collapse panel expand icons
notes: Applies to all Collapse panel components
